word: G131 - αἱμοῤῥέω - haimorrhéō - hahee-mor-hreh'-o - Diseased with an issue of blood

sections.paragraph: Short Definition: Diseased with an issue of blood

αἱμοῤῥέω - aihmorrheō - hahee-mor-hreh'-o

From G129 and G4482; to flow blood, that is, have a haemorrhage: - diseased with an issue of blood.
